title: Tiling a Rectangle with the Fewest Squares

testcases.input: n = 2, m = 3 Output: 3 Explanation: 3 squares are necessary to cover the rectangle. 2 (squares of 1x1) 1 (square of 2x2)
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: 3 squares are necessary to cover the rectangle. 2 (squares of 1x1) 1 (square of 2x2)
